title: Value Investing
html:
Value Investing

The first analytical framework Yahir adopted as a teenager and the one that quietly underwrites every later founder mode. Value investing in the corpus is less a portfolio strategy than an epistemic posture — go where they ain't, know your circle of competence, ask the question whose answer is non-trivial. By the time he's running Rankett in 2026, the surface vocabulary has shifted to ai search optimization and whitelabel strategy, but the underlying instincts are the same Charlie-Munger maxims he was quoting at 17.

The earliest specimen is the late-March 2020 dump (2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist) — 17-year-old Yahir, eleven days into the COVID crash, building a watchlist of Carnival Corp, Live Nation, Emerson Electric, Beyond Meat, Hertz, Zoom, and recruitment stocks (BG Staffing, KForce, Paychex), with the note "Leaning towards risking it for the biscuit and be safe with it with gold long term." Curzio Research is namechecked. A month later (2020 04 23 go to diamond) the Munger maxims appear in their canonical form: "Go where they ain't", "What's within your circle of competence?", "If we knew the answer, it wouldn't be the most important question." The custodial TD Ameritrade account opens around this time. The same note name-drops the "1987 crash", "reconstruction of civil warfare", "Gini coefficient", and a Matt Ridley book on human innovation — value-investing reading list disguised as a teen to-do dump. The macro framing in 2020 03 24 exogenous event 911 ("like 9/11, already underlined with ropes conditions today, like the dot com bubble") is the same brain operating top-down.

The college period absorbs this into OSIG (Oregon State Investment Group, fall 2022, 2022 09 13 drive thru weed) and the Coinbase pitch deck work in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — same skill set, different instruments. The 2022 Ahmad-Jamal-stream junk drawer also crystallizes the founder-side restatement: "Take existing things if equivalent value, but make them with 1/10 less resources and significantly cheaper" — value investing applied to building rather than buying. The asking the right question line from the same note ("Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have") is the Munger circle-of-competence question repointed at AI.

The arc terminates — for now — in the Gartner-stat hoarding visible in 2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 38 pm 56e50e24 ("20-50% of help-desk calls are password resets, average reset costs $38"). Yahir is no longer picking stocks; he's picking inefficiencies to dissolve with software. Same posture, different game.

Source summaries

  • 2019 03 14 voice memo 1625 — 39-min broker investing-101 at age 15
  • 2020 03 24 exogenous event 911
  • 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist
  • 2020 04 23 go to diamond
  • 2022 09 13 drive thru weed
